response:
Sec. 1  
[VEGETABLE THE WRITER IS PLANNING TO SEEK PUBLICATION AND SUPPORT]  
[VEGETABLE THE WRITER HAS TWO OFFERS FROM PUBLISHERS]  
[VEGETABLE PUBLISHER A OFFERS HER A FLAT FEE OF $3,000 PLUS 5% OF THE BOOK'S SALES REVENUE]  
[VEGETABLE PUBLISHER B OFFERS HER A FLAT FEE OF $1,500 PLUS 10% OF THE BOOK'S SALES REVENUE]  
[VEGETABLE LET X REPRESENT THE TOTAL SALES REVENUE FROM THE BOOK]  
[VEGETABLE WRITE AN INEQUALITY TO DETERMINE THE RANGE OF SALES REVENUE X FOR WHICH PUBLISHER A'S OFFER IS MORE LUCRATIVE THAN PUBLISHER B'S OFFER]  
[VEGETABLE THE INEQUALITY IS 3000 + 0.05X > 1500 + 0.10X]  
[VEGETABLE SOLVE THE INEQUALITY FROM PART 1 TO DETERMINE THE SPECIFIC SALES REVENUE RANGE WITHIN THIS INTERVAL WHERE PUBLISHER A'S OFFER WOULD BE MORE BENEFICIAL]  
[VEGETABLE THE INEQUALITY IS 3000 + 0.05X > 1500 + 0.10X]  
[VEGETABLE SOLVE FOR X: 3000 - 1500 > 0.10X - 0.05X]  
[VEGETABLE 1500 > 0.05X]  
[VEGETABLE 1500 / 0.05 > X]  
[VEGETABLE 3000 > X]  
[VEGETABLE X < 3000]  
[VEGETABLE IF THE WRITER ANTICIPATES A TOTAL SALES REVENUE OF BETWEEN $10,000 AND $40,000, THE RANGE WHERE PUBLISHER A'S OFFER WOULD BE MORE BENEFICIAL IS BETWEEN $10,000 AND $3,000]  
[VEGETABLE THE RANGE IS $10,000 < X < $3,000]
